text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from a walk, I run into
Matikanetannhauser and some of her friends, and
we all head back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Geez... I can't believe I ended up nodding off
during hide-and-seek...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. We were playing with some kids as part of
our volunteer work.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I ended up falling asleep in the middle of the
game...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to get so down about it!
Everyone looked like they were having a great
time.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But Tannhauser, I have to ask, where the heck did
you hide?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Even after the kids left, we still couldn't find you.
We were panicking, thinking something had
happened to you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I heard we were gonna play hide-and-seek at the
park, so I went ahead and scoped out the best
spots beforehand.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wait, don't tell me...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Is that notebook filled with hiding places?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I don't get it, though. I thought I'd picked a spot
where even a kid should be able to find me
easily...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Wait!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Could it be that I'm so normal and boring that the
kids just forgot about me?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um, no... I really think it's just that you hid too
well...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this is no good at all! I've got to become an
Umamusume brimming with character so nobody
will forget me again!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um! I think you're fine and memorable just the
way you are!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the vote of confidence! But it's
okay—I'm determined to be better!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So, this is where I ask you, the professional
trainer, to give me some advice.
choice_data_list:
Maybe you should discuss this with other
Umamusume.
I think you're fine as you are.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You're so right! Tracen Academy is full of unique Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll go talk to them!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Uniqueness, you say? Ah, I see... you long to be
even a fraction as remarkable as myself, the great
T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Put those feelings into song! Come,
play it for me! The aria of your soul!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um, okay—here goes! Oh, how I praaaay! ♪ That
I will becooome a unique Umamusumeeee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Well, th-that was a beautiful song, but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Maybe that's not the best way to define yourself, Tannhauser...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You wish to be unique? Hehe, what a splendid
proposition! Here, I'll give you my newest
concoction!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just one sip and you will transform into a truly
magnificent being, one that has transcended the
limits of an Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Can it really do all that?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: STOOOOP!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's too dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times her friends try to stop
her, Matikanetannhauser's desire to define herself
cannot be quelled.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Stay as I am? You mean "stay ordinary and
boring"?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't call you ordinary per se... but you're
wonderful just as you are!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You're always hardworking and
straightforward, Tannhauser! You're already the
best you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wowww! Thank you so much, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Stay as I am, huh? Hehe. I'm feeling pretty
confident all of a sudden.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So, instead of worrying about how to be me... I
just need to keep trying my best in my own way.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I gotta keep it simple and not overthink it. Just
keep my eyes on the prize and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Completely reinvent myself through fashion and a
new haircut!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Why would you do that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the three of us desperately try to stop
Matikanetannhauser from choosing bizarre wigs
and clothes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I see what you're doing... You're trying to comfort
me, aren't you?! That's such a kind gesture...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Can kindness be a unique trait? Maybe
if I'm kind to enough people...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Uh, Tannhauser?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Like helping people in trouble or searching for
lost cats from missing posters...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um, don't you do that stuff already?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yes! I think that'll work! All right, it's go time!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Thanks, everyone! I'm gonna become super kind!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Um, Tannhauser?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: She ran off...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser runs off with new resolve. A
short while later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I found a cat and helped a bunch of people, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now that I stop and think about it, helping
people in trouble is actually pretty normal. I
mean, any average girl would do the same.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I was trying to become unique by
doing totally normal things... What was I
thinking?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is so embarrassing. But at least...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I got thanked by even more people than usual
today! Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Matikanetannhauser seems to think she
failed, there are no signs of regret in her smile.
